cards.name: 9 of Cups
cards.interpretation: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure

cards.name: ⅩⅥ The Tower, reversed
cards.interpretation: averting disaster, delaying the inevitable, resisting change

cards.name: Ace of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: delays, blocks, lack of passion, lack of energy, hesitancy, creative blocks
